response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with ~14-16 years of hands-on experience across web, embedded, and data-integration systems, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and senior advisory experience with strategic customers — none of which are evident. AI exposure is recent and limited; there is no track record of technical leadership at the principal/director scale, no cloud-platform strategy work, and no evidence of inspiring large organizations or advising strategic partners.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering track record across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data systems
Strong software craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling authorship
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at the scale the role requires
No evidence of Principal/Director-level IC influence, cross-org strategy work, or advising strategic customers
Cloud experience is limited (AWS CDK on one team); no platform-level cloud strategy or architecture leadership shown

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
No principal-level strategic/advisory leadership track record
Broad, durable engineering experience with craftsmanship rigor
